name: result-probe
label: Result Probe
description: Minimal connector that returns the same payload three different ways (bare dict, Result.set_data, Result.set_result) so we can observe how FortiSOAR normalizes each into the execute envelope.

fields.name: marker
fields.title: Marker
fields.tooltip: Arbitrary value echoed back so we can confirm config reaches the operation.

operations.title: Return Bare Dict
operations.description: Returns a plain dict. The platform should wrap it under the envelope's data key.

operations.title: Return Result.set_data
operations.description: Returns a Result() with set_status/set_message/set_data — the pattern the building guide recommends.

operations.title: Return Result.set_result
operations.description: Returns a Result() using set_result(status, message) only — the status-without-data pattern seen in real connectors.
